news.title: Komedyen Deniz Göktaş hakkında soruşturma başlatıldı
news.summary: Komedyen Deniz Göktaş hakkında İstanbul Cumhuriyet Başsavcılığı tarafından soruşturma başlatıldı. Soruşturmaya "Bir kısım sosyal medya platformlarında yayınlamış olduğu içeriklerde suç unsuru ifadeler" tespit edilmesi sebep gösterildi.

news.title: Suriyelilere çalışma izni muafiyeti getirilmesi ne anlama geliyor?

news.title: Brezilya son dakika golüyle Japonya'yı geçip, son 16'ya kaldı
news.summary: Dünya Kupası'nda bugüne kadar en çok şampiyonluk yaşayan ülke olan Brezilya, bugün son 32 turunda karşılaştığı Japonya'yı son dakika golüyle 2-1 yenerek turu geçti.

news.title: AB'den Türkiye'ye kritik üçlü ziyaret

news.title: Tanju Özcan'a cinsel saldırı soruşturmasında tahliye

news.title: "Şikayet etmezsen adam değilsin" dedi, 180 bin TL ceza yedi

news.title: Müge Anlı yeni sezon tarihi
news.summary: ATV'nin programı Müge Anlı ile Tatlı Sert, 26 Haziran Cuma günü yayınlanan sezon finaliyle yaz tatiline çıktı. Yeni sezonda ekranlara ne zaman döneceği merak edilen program için gözler ATV'nin yayın takvimine çevrilirken, izleyiciler "Müge

news.title: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
news.summary: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

news.title: Six people shot dead at centre for mothers and children in Germany
news.summary: The male suspect who has been arrested was in a custody dispute over his baby daughter, police say.

news.title: Trump's final appeal of E Jean Carroll sex abuse case rejected
news.summary: The Supreme Court decision means the US president will now have to pay Carroll the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she had been awarded.

news.title: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
news.summary: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.

news.title: Putin makes rare admission of fuel shortages caused by Ukrainian strikes
news.summary: The Russian president acknowledged Ukraine's attacks were "obviously creating problems" but denied the shortages were "critical".

news.title: South African leader warns anti-migrant protesters ahead of unofficial deadline
news.summary: Thousands of people from other African countries have left South Africa ahead of Tuesday's deadline set by anti-migrant groups.

news.title: Martinelli scores late as Brazil beat Japan 2-1, enter World Cup last 16
news.summary: Martinelli's stoppage-time goal takes the five-time champions to the Round of 16, breaking Japanese hearts in Houston.

news.title: Deadly heatwave grips Italy and Balkans as wildfire fears grow
news.summary: Older people remain most at risk as the heatwave drives up excess deaths across Europe.

news.title: Israeli attacks kill four men and a boy in Gaza and a teenager in West Bank
news.summary: Israeli rights group B’Tselem has condemned the 'unprecedented killing of Palestinian children and teenagers"

news.title: Pakistani strikes kill dozens of Afghan villagers
news.summary: Afghan villagers inspected destroyed homes after overnight Pakistani strikes targeting Taliban-allied fighters.

news.title: Israel launches attacks and incursions inside southern Syria
news.summary: Israeli forces have shelled a village in southern Syria, firing artillery and illumination flares overnight.

news.title: ‘Miracle’: Man pulled from rubble four days after Venezuelan quakes
news.summary: A 21-year-old man was pulled alive from the rubble of an apartment building in La Guaira, Venezuela.

news.title: Senate Ethics Committee dismisses complaint against Sen. Ruben Gallego
news.summary: The committee had been alerted by a fellow member of Congress of allegations of campaign finance violations and potential sexual misconduct, but said it found no evidence of wrongdoing.

news.title: They were world-class tennis rivals. Now friends, they've teamed up against cancer
news.summary: They were the women's tennis champions of their generation. Now, Chris Evert and Martina Navratilova open up about friendship, cancer and retirement in the documentary Chris & Martina: The Final Set.

news.title: Supreme Court restricts use of geofence warrants
news.summary: Writing for the 6-3 majority, Justice Elena Kagan said that the technique, known as geofencing, violates the Fourth Amendment's prohibition against unreasonable searches.

news.title: Supreme Court says Fed's Lisa Cook can stay in her job for now
news.summary: The court's decision means Cook can stay in her position as her challenge to her dismissal plays out in the lower courts.

news.title: Supreme Court cements Trump's power over agencies long considered independent
news.summary: In a 6-3 decision, the Supreme Court struck down a 91-year-old precedent that has prevented presidents from removing members of independent agencies meant to be a check on his power.

news.title: The Supreme Court upholds grace periods for mail-in ballots, siding against the GOP
news.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court has upheld a Mississippi law that allows election officials to count mail-in ballots that are postmarked by Election Day but received up to five days after it.

news.title: ‘Everyone is talking about Cape Verde’: World Cup run delights diaspora community in UK

news.title: ‘Constitutional coup’ claims as Zimbabwe senate approves extending presidential term

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
